DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR ORDER FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING CLAIM IS UNOPPOSED AND GRANTED IN ITS ENTIRETY. THE CLAIM FILED BY CLAIMANT MARLON CABALLERO IS HEREBY STRICKEN IN ITS ENTIRETY FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AS WELL AS DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. MOVING PARTY IS GRANTED LEAVE TO WITHDRAW ITS PETITION FOR FORFEITURE AND TO PROCEED WITH NON-JUDICIAL FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES FLEMING; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED. (302)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim; Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Rebecca Wagner In Support Thereof [Proposed Order]
Off Calendar Sep-28-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rebecca D. Wagner, Esq., Assistant District Attorney, 415.553.4997, for petitioner and moving party;
No other appearance.

Petitioner's counsel stipulated to the judge pro tem.

RULING: There being no appearance by respondent, and no objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is unopposed and granted in its entirety. The Claim filed by Claimant Marlon Caballero is hereby stricken in its entirety for failure to comply with the Court's Order Compelling Answers to Form and Special Interrogatories, as well as Demand for Production of Documents. Moving party is granted leave to withdraw its Petition for Forfeiture and to proceed with Non-Judicial Forfeiture Proceedings.

Order signed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories [Proposed Order]
Off Calendar Jun-09-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rebecca D. Wagner, of Office of the District Attorney, Tel. 415.553.4997, for petitioners;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Tom Paoli; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
